title: Exzact Cutlery Set 24pcs Stainless Steel, Vintage Style Antique Cream Handles ABS, Elegant Retro Style
features: Exzact stainless steel cutlery set of 24pcs, includes 6 x dinner forks, 6 x dinner knifes, 6 x tea spoons, and 6 x table spoons. In the colour of ivory cream, with beautifully engraved details;
Dimension: in length - Dinner Knife 22 cm, Dinner Folk 20.5 cm, Teaspoon 17.5 cm, Table Spoon 20 cm;
Material: Mirror polished premium stainless steel and ABS, anti-scratch and durable;
High quality and luxury, this unique design is perfect for wedding, dinner party, gifting, or add a touch of antique for your own table setting;
description: Product Description Innovative, Dynamic and Excellent in Home, Travel and Smart Life. Exzact offers a wide range of cutlery set and kitchen products, made from high-quality material, with designs from traditional to contemporary to suit your everyday life or special events. We help you enjoy great food everyday from breakfast with family to dining with friends, from tea break in your office to a barbecue in the garden. For family with kids, our children cutlery set perfectly designed to suit children's dinning of age group from 24 months to 12 years. With our Ergonomic design, kids learn how to eat quicker and effortless. EXZACT Cutlery Set 24pcs Stainless Steel - with Rivet Craft Handles Multi colours Available - Black/ Turquoise/ Cream Exzact offers a wide range of cutlery set and kitchen products, made from high-quality material, with designs from traditional to contemporary to suit your everyday life or special events. We help you enjoy great food everyday from breakfast with family to dining with friends, from tea break in your office to a barbecue in the garden. Premium quality stainless steel. Dishwasher safe. Wooden-looking elegant craft design Dishwasher Safe Dishwasher safe, extremely durable. *Kind reminder: not leave your cutlery sitting in water, as soaking can permanently damage the metal. Stainless Steel Food grade and free of any hazardous materials. Gifting Great gift as a birthday present or Christmas gift.
